calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rita Hock in Propria Persona.

The Court advised Ms. Hock that the statute does not allow payment to a Paralegal, stated that the Paralegal helped Ms. Hock to do her job, that the amount of $1,300.00 that was paid to the Paralegal will be deducted from Ms. Hock's fees and that it will disallow another $1,300.00. The Court will modify the proposed order to reflect the above. The Court granted the petition for final distribution (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
